name: Awin
description: Awin publisher API for program discovery, program details, offers/vouchers, link builder, and publisher transaction reporting.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: Awin API token
credential_fields.description: Personal API token from Awin API Credentials.

tools.name: programs_list
tools.description: List Awin advertiser programmes for a publisher, optionally filtered by relationship and country.

countryCode.description: ISO 3166 alpha-2 country code such as GB, DE, FR.

tools.name: program_details_get
tools.description: Get KPIs, description, and commission range for one Awin advertiser programme.

tools.name: offers_list
tools.description: Retrieve Awin promotions and voucher codes from joined and non-joined advertisers.

filters.description: Awin filters object: advertiserIds, exclusiveOnly, membership, regionCodes, status, type, updatedSince.

pagination.description: Awin pagination object: page and pageSize.

tools.name: tracking_link_generate
tools.description: Generate one or a batch of Awin tracking links/deeplinks for an advertiser.

parameters.description: Awin click parameters such as campaign, clickref, clickref2 through clickref6.

tools.name: transactions_list
tools.description: List publisher transactions for a date range and optional advertiser/status filters.

startDate.description: Required by Awin transaction API, ISO date-time.

endDate.description: Required by Awin transaction API, ISO date-time.
